---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability or workflow you'd like us to add.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem are you trying to solve?

Describe the concrete workflow or task that isn't possible (or isn't ergonomic) today. Feature ideas without a grounded problem tend to stall — we prioritise based on the *problem*, not the proposed solution.

## What would success look like?

If this feature existed, what would a Claude prompt + tool invocation look like? What would the successful output be? What would you measure to know it worked?

## Alternatives you've considered

- Existing Bitrix24.Market apps that solve some of the problem?
- Claude prompts or workarounds you've already tried?
- Adjacent tools in other ecosystems (Zapier, Make, n8n, etc.)?

## Scope & urgency

- How many people on your team would use this?
- Is this blocking a rollout, or a nice-to-have?
- Any deadline or event it's tied to?

## Anything else

Screenshots, mock-ups, links to related discussions, etc.
